# Frequently Asked Questions (AUTO GENERATED)

## General Questions

### What is wwebjs?

wwebjs is a WhatsApp Web API client for Node.js that connects through the WhatsApp Web browser app. It provides a simple and powerful interface to interact with WhatsApp programmatically.

### Is wwebjs free to use?

Yes, wwebjs is completely free and open-source under the MIT license.

### Does wwebjs require WhatsApp Business API?

No, wwebjs uses the regular WhatsApp Web interface and works with both personal and business accounts.

## Technical Questions

### What Node.js version is required?

wwebjs requires Node.js version 22.12.0 or higher.

### Can I use TypeScript?

Yes! wwebjs is written in TypeScript and provides full type definitions.

### Is multi-device support available?

Yes, wwebjs supports WhatsApp's multi-device feature.

### Can I run multiple clients simultaneously?

Yes, you can run multiple client instances with different sessions.

## Troubleshooting

### QR code not scanning?

Make sure your WhatsApp app is up to date and try regenerating the QR code.

### Client disconnects frequently?

Check your internet connection and ensure your session is properly saved.

### Rate limiting issues?

WhatsApp implements rate limits. Avoid sending too many messages in a short time.

## Support

For more help, visit our [Discord community](https://discord.gg/wwebjs) or check the [Documentation](/documentation).
